narrative:
Etna Township B (precinct in Licking County) has 2,035 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.9 percentage points.
